message:
fix(bootstrap): add validation parity with explicit import path

Bootstrap JSONL import was skipping validations that explicit import
enforces, which matters because bootstrap often runs during corruption
recovery when source data may not be trustworthy.

Changes to parseJSONLWithErrors:
- Reject issues with empty ID (corruption check)
- Reject issues with invalid status enum (catches typos like 'opne')
- Auto-fix closed_at on non-closed issues (clear it)
- Auto-fix tombstone missing deleted_at (set to now)
- Auto-fix non-tombstone with deleted_at (clear it)

Changes to importIssuesBootstrap:
- Add external_ref uniqueness tracking (skip duplicates)
- Add tombstone resurrection protection: pre-scan identifies tombstone
  IDs so live versions are skipped when a tombstone exists

Closes: dolt-test-b2x4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
